---
title: "Blog"
title-block-banner: true
image: /assets/images/social-profile.png
subtitle: "*[{{< iconify fa7-solid:square-rss >}} RSS Feed](blog.xml)*"
margin-header: "*[{{< iconify fa7-solid:square-rss >}} RSS Feed](blog.xml)*"
grid:
  sidebar-width: 150px
  body-width: 800px
  margin-width: 150px
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  template: assets/listing-templates/blog.ejs
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 6
  feed:
    language: en-gb
---
